basic_info.title: Shin Megami Tensei: Persona 4
basic_info.review: A masterpiece of the JRPG genre that perfectly balances social simulation with engaging turn-based combat, praised for its memorable characters and gripping mystery.

play_today.details: Best portable option with full Golden content. Includes Chie's dungeon, voice acting, and new difficulty settings. Runs at 30 FPS in handheld mode with occasional frame drops in crowded areas. No native widescreen support, but offers convenient on-the-go play with cloud save integration.
Persona 4 Golden available on PlayStation Store

The definitive modern experience via Steam. Features native widescreen support, customizable difficulty, and cloud saves. Includes all Golden content like Chie's dungeon and voice acting. Mod support allows UI overhauls and QoL improvements not present in original. Runs at 60 FPS with minimal input lag.

recommended_patches.name: P4G Community Enhancement Pack (P4G CEP)
recommended_patches.description: An all-in-one mod manager and collection for the Windows PC version of Persona 4 Golden, providing over 50 quality-of-life improvements including auto-save, widescreen support, UI scaling, and bug fixes.

recommended_patches.name: P4G PC Fixes + Quality-of-Life Mod Directory
recommended_patches.description: A curated Steam Workshop collection for the Windows version containing essential fixes for the 64-bit port, including resolution fixes, text corrections, and performance optimizations.

recommended_patches.name: P4G Nightmare Mod Difficulty
recommended_patches.description: A difficulty enhancement mod specifically for the Windows 64-bit version that increases enemy stats and adds new challenges for experienced players.

play_today.details: Original Golden release with full content including Chie's dungeon and voice acting. Runs at 60 FPS with excellent performance. Requires physical hardware or emulator. No native widescreen support, but offers the most authentic experience with original controls and UI design.

optimal_settings: Enable GPU backend (Vulkan or OpenGL) for best performance
Set internal resolution to 2x native for sharper visuals
Enable 'Skip Present' to reduce input lag if experiencing stutter
Map controller inputs to match original Vita layout for authentic feel
Enable GPU backend (Vulkan recommended for modern devices)
Set internal resolution to 1.5x native to balance performance and clarity
Enable 'Async Shaders' to reduce frame drops in crowded areas
Configure touch controls to overlay on-screen buttons for Vita-specific interactions

description.synopsis: In the rural town of Inaba, a series of mysterious murders occurs where victims are found in the fog. A high school student named Yu Narukami moves to the town and discovers that the murders are linked to a distorted world accessible through television screens. He joins a group of friends who can enter this world to confront the 'shadows' of the killers, uncovering a conspiracy that challenges their perceptions of truth and friendship.
key_features: Dual gameplay loop alternating between high school social simulation and dungeon crawling
Social Link system allowing deep character bonding that enhances combat abilities
Turn-based combat utilizing the Persona summoning and fusion system
Dynamic weather system where foggy days trigger supernatural dungeon events
TV World mechanic where characters enter a distorted dimension to confront inner demons
All-Out Attack cooperative combat mechanic triggered by defeating enemies in sequence
Time management system requiring players to balance school, work, and social activities
Character customization through clothing, hairstyles, and accessories
Multiple endings determined by player choices and Social Link completion
Integration of pop culture references and a distinct jazz/rock soundtrack
legacy_and_impact: Persona 4 revitalized the Persona series in the West, establishing the franchise as a global phenomenon. Its narrative structure and social mechanics heavily influenced the design of subsequent entries like Persona 5 and inspired a wave of social sim-RPG hybrids.
